name: Hand-mechanism spacer (disc)
notes: Disc spacer. Glue note on Panel D: 'Glue to cardboard 1mm thick' — represented as material=cardboard-1mm. Per §II.D: pieces 91, 92, and 92a stack along the minute-hand axle to separate piece 4 from the minute-hand wheel. The same axle (id 'minute-hand-axle') is shared with piece 91. Labels on the disc itself are plain 'a' (12 o'clock) and 'b' (6 o'clock) — orientation markers only, no outward subscript. The connection is expressed from piece 4's side: piece 4 carries dotted curved positioning guides labeled '92a' and '92b' showing where this disc aligns. connections[] is therefore empty here; see piece-004.json. (Earlier transcription error in embedded-labels.md recorded the labels as 'a₄₁'/'b₄₁' — corrected after scan verification.)
